nodes.label: Agent system interface
nodes.description: Evaluates dynamic agent management, available role lanes, optional reviewers, and user-facing control points.

nodes.label: Human decision governance
nodes.description: Compresses real human decisions into explicit batches and prevents fake needs-human gates.

nodes.label: External signal briefing
nodes.description: Collects public technology/economy signals and turns them into daily issue-brief candidates.

nodes.label: Improvement governor accountability
nodes.description: Tracks whether improvement governor suggestions become owned execution lanes, verified artifacts, and user-visible service improvements.

nodes.label: Infrastructure visibility
nodes.description: Maps cloud resources, provider readiness, topology, and public-safe live status.

nodes.label: Knowledge OS / LLM-Wiki
nodes.description: Turns docs, runtime artifacts, and graph outputs into reusable knowledge and retrieval evidence.

nodes.label: Life process agentization
nodes.description: Turns life-process scopes into repeatable collect-analyze-act-verify agent loops.

nodes.label: Service UX integration
nodes.description: Keeps user-facing guidance, navigation, theming, and service surfaces integrated instead of fragmented.

nodes.label: LLM-Wiki 검색/재사용 ROI evidence 늘리기
nodes.verification: npm run llmwiki:assess && npm run knowledge:retrieval:check

nodes.label: 라이프 에이전트화를 scope 단위에서 domain 단위로 승격
nodes.verification: npm run life:agentization && npm run life:check

nodes.label: Needs Human 결정 묶음을 더 줄이고 자동 위임 후보를 분리
nodes.verification: npm run decision:digest:check && npm run decision:sync:check && npm run live:api:check

nodes.label: 외부 기술/경제 신호를 KST 일일 이슈 브리프로 승격
nodes.verification: npm run life:input:external && npm run deploy:briefing:check

edges.reason: Agent availability and bottleneck evidence should shape the control hub UX.
Human-gated decisions should route to replacement loops, not stay as isolated tickets.
External signals may become daily issue brief decisions or issue-routing candidates.
Governor performance must be visible to the user as a service scorecard, not hidden in logs.
Governor suggestions must reduce decision bottlenecks instead of adding unmanaged work.
Infrastructure readiness constrains which agent operations can be trusted.
Knowledge must appear in the user-facing service and guide users to relevant evidence.
Verified agent runs should become reusable operating knowledge.

hookContract.failurePolicy: fail if required concepts, evidence links, or suggestion mappings are missing
